context: Tests whether Core Data staged migration guidance uses current iOS 17+ API shapes and store setup.

checklist.name: Checksum stages
checklist.description: States that NSLightweightMigrationStage uses version checksums, not human-readable model names.

checklist.name: Model reference initializer
checklist.description: Uses NSManagedObjectModelReference with a required versionChecksum, such as name:in:versionChecksum:.

checklist.name: Custom stage endpoints
checklist.description: Includes both source and destination model references when constructing an NSCustomMigrationStage.

checklist.name: Store option
checklist.description: Shows or clearly describes adding NSPersistentStoreStagedMigrationManagerOptionKey before loading the persistent store.
